About 1818 Auctioneers
Heading into our third century of auctioneering, we are a friendly auction house based at Junction 36 of the M6, which is easy to access from Cumbria, Lancashire and Yorkshire.
Our purpose-built offices and salerooms are part of the J36 Rural Auction Centre and they house a team of experts and support staff who thrive on the buzz of auctioneering. We all work hard to make your experience of buying and selling at auction easy and enjoyable.
We hold online, timed auctions every week. Our auctions include vintage, antiques and collectables, furniture and furnishings, and prints and pictures. We also run regular valuers auctions such as music, jewellery, silver, military, coins, textiles. Every auction is available for online bidding and runs for two weeks, so buyers have plenty of time to choose and secure their favourite lots.
